summary: The changes introduced across these commits include the initial setup of the project, adding foundational files, and creating several new text files. First, the project was initialized with basic configuration files like `.gitattributes` and a `README.md` to provide an overview. Then, all core files for the project were added, including compiled Python files and other supporting resources. Later, three new text files—`Random_Story.txt`, `Important_Info.txt`, and `more_data.txt`—were created, containing small amounts of content. These updates primarily affected documentation and text-based files, along with the initial setup of the codebase.
next_steps: Add a `.gitignore` file to exclude compiled Python files and other unnecessary files from version control
Write unit tests for any Python modules added to the project
Refactor the text files into a structured format or directory for better organization
Update the `README.md` to include details about the purpose and usage of the project
Remove or replace compiled Python files with source code files to ensure transparency and maintainability
